title: Aterian Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results
text: Second quarter 2024 net revenue declined 20.6% to $28.0 million, compared to $35.3 million in the second quarter of 2023, primarily reflecting the impact of SKU rationalization efforts. Despite the revenue decline, the company achieved significant profitability improvements. Gross margin improved to 60.4%, compared to 42.2% in the second quarter of 2023. Contribution margin improved to 17.4% from -3.6% in the second quarter of 2023. Operating loss was reduced by 91.2% to $3.2 million, and net loss improved by 89.6% to $3.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA turned positive at $0.2 million. For the third quarter of 2024, Aterian Management believes that net revenue will be between $25.0 million and $27.0 million and that adjusted EBITDA will be between $0.0 million to $0.6 million. Additionally, Management continues to believe that the Company will be profitable on an Adjusted EBITDA basis for the second half of 2024.
